docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,250.85 FILED BY SAMPSON, AL AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, RHEKA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMPSON, AL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00- SERVED JAN-06-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS, RHEKA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMPSON, AL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLS, RHEKA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON MAY 29, 2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
